title: Travel Journal | NYC + Crop & Create Cornwall
excerpt: Remember how I said October was a blur? Well so was September. I posted Jack's 3rd Birthday Party video on YouTube the other day, but it happened back on September 17. Please tell me I am not the only one…
body:
Remember how I said October was a blur? Well so was September. I posted Jack's 3rd Birthday Party video on YouTube the other day, but it happened back on September 17. Please tell me I am not the only one who feels like time is just FLYING?! Luckily though, there are plenty of good things going on and being busy is something that is just my reality at the moment.

Hope you enjoy the video and feel like you were a part of the trip!
